name: Stats
description: Per-user watch statistics and analytics dashboard for Jellyfin.
overview: Adds a Statistics button to the Jellyfin sidebar with detailed per-user watch history, activity graphs, top genres, binge stats, top actors/directors, and a server-wide leaderboard.

versions.changelog: Initial release. Per-user watch statistics dashboard with activity graphs, genre breakdowns, show completion tracking, binge stats, top actors/directors, and a server-wide leaderboard.
